requirements.full_sentence:
Short Title and Commencement
(1) These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Small Finance Banks
- Internal Ombudsman) Directions, 2026.
requirements.object: Bank of India (Small Finance Banks - Internal Ombudsman) Directions, 2026

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect except clause 7(2),
14(2) and 14(4) which shall be complied with, latest by June 30, 2026.
requirements.object: immediate effect except clause 7(2), 14(2) and 14(4) which shall be complied with, latest by June 30, 2026

conditions: if it is satisfied that it is expedient so to do
requirements.full_sentence:
Suspension
(1) The Reserve Bank, if it is satisfied that it is expedient so to do, may, by an order,
suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all of
the provisions of these Directions, either generally or in relation to any specified regulated
entity.
requirements.object: suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all of the provisions of these Directions, either gen

requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
(2) The Reserve Bank may by an order, extend from time to time, the period of any
suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit.
requirements.object: from time to time, the period of any suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit

requirements.full_sentence:
Applicability
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to Small Finance Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') having 10 or more banking
outlets in India as on March 31, 2025.
requirements.object: Finance Banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank') having 10 or more banking outlets

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The directions shall also be applicable to the Small Finance bank, which meets
the above mentioned criteria after March 31, 2025, with effect from six months from
meeting the eligibility criteria.
requirements.object: the Small Finance bank, which meets the above mentioned criteria after March 31, 2025, with effect from six months from meeting

requirements.full_sentence:
Definitions
(1) In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them as below:
requirements.object: to them as below:

requirements.full_sentence:
(b) "Competent Authority" means Whole Time Director / Executive Director-in-
charge of customer service vertical of the bank;
requirements.object: Executive Director-in- charge of customer service vertical of the bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(c) "Complaint" means a representation in writing or through other modes alleging
deficiency in service on the part of the bank with or without seeking relief thereon;
requirements.object: or through other modes alleging deficiency in service on the part of the bank with or without seeking relief thereon

requirements.full_sentence:
(d) "Credit Information Company (CIC)" means a company as defined in the
Companies Act, 2013 and has been granted a certificate of registration under sub-
section (2) of section 5 of the Credit Information Companies (Regulation) Act,
2005;
requirements.object: in the Companies Act, 2013 and has been granted a certificate of registration under sub- section (2) of section 5 of the Credit I

requirements.full_sentence:
(e) "Customer" means a person who uses, or is an applicant for, a service provided
by the bank;
requirements.object: or is an applicant for, a service provided by the bank
otherwise, which may or may not result in financial loss or damage to the customer

requirements.full_sentence:
IO)" means any person appointed under
clause 6 of these Directions;
requirements.object: clause 6 of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
(h) "Financial Sector Regulatory Body" means regulatory body for financial sector
entities and includes:
requirements.object: sector entities and includes:

requirements.full_sentence:
(i) "Internal Ombudsman (IO)" means any person appointed under clause 5 of
these Directions;
requirements.object: clause 5 of these Directions

requirements.full_sentence:
(j) "Regulated Entity (RE)" means a commercial bank or payments bank or small
finance bank or a non-banking financial company or a non-bank prepaid payment
instrument issuer or a credit information company which are covered under the
purview of the Internal Ombudsman framework, or any other entity as may be
specified by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
requirements.object: Reserve Bank from time to time

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934, the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007, the Credit Information
Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005, the Credit Information Companies Rules, 2006,
the Credit Information Companies Regulations, 2006, or the Reserve Bank - Integrated
Ombudsman Scheme (as amended from time to time) or regulations, directions and
guidelines issued by the Reserve Bank of India.
requirements.object: as assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, the Payment and Settlement Syst

requirements.full_sentence:
Appointment of Internal Ombudsman
(1) The IO shall either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a
General Manager in the RE under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman framework or
a Financial Sector Regulatory Body, having necessary skills and experience of minimum
seven years of working in areas such as banking, non-banking finance, regulation,
supervision, payment and settlement systems, credit information or consumer protection.
requirements.object: or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a General Manager in the RE under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman framework or

conditions: if the person is a serving officer
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, if the person is a serving officer, he / she is required to relinquish
the same before assuming charge as IO.
requirements.object: before assuming charge as IO

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The IO shall not have been previously employed, nor presently be employed, by
the bank or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the bank.
requirements.object: nor presently be employed, by the bank or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the bank

requirements.full_sentence: (3) The IO shall not be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure.
requirements.object: of age before the completion of the tenure

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) A person may work as the IO in more than one RE simultaneously at the discretion
of the REs concerned, subject to the approval of the Board or Customer Service
Committee / Consumer Protection Committee of the Board of the appointing RE.
requirements.object: in more than one RE simultaneously at the discretion of the REs concerned

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a
Deputy General Manager in the RE under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman
framework or a Financial Sector Regulatory Body, having necessary skills and
experience of minimum five years of working in areas such as banking, non-banking
finance, regulation, supervision, payment and settlement systems, credit information or
consumer protection.
requirements.object: or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a Deputy General Manager in the RE under the purview of the Internal Ombudsman frame

conditions: if the person is a serving officer
requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that, if the person is a serving officer, he / she is required to relinquish
the same before assuming charge as Dy.
requirements.object: before assuming charge as Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall not have been previously employed, nor presently be employed,
by the bank or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the bank.
requirements.object: nor presently be employed, by the bank or a holding, associate or subsidiary company of the bank

requirements.full_sentence: IO shall not be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure.
requirements.object: of age before the completion of the tenure

requirements.full_sentence: IO shall not be employed in more than one RE simultaneously.
requirements.object: than one RE simultaneously

requirements.full_sentence:
Number of Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal Ombudsman
(1) Every bank shall appoint at least one IO.
requirements.object: IO

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The Customer Service Committee of the Board of the bank shall determine, at
least once in a year, the number of IO/ Dy.
requirements.object: in a year, the number of IO/ Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO, the bank shall consider the need for
diversity of experience of the incumbents to deal with different types of cases.
requirements.object: diversity of experience of the incumbents to deal with different types of cases

requirements.full_sentence:
In such
cases, the bank may clearly define the jurisdiction of each IO / Dy.
requirements.object: of each IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence: IO in the bank shall be contractual.

(2) The bank shall ensure that the post of the IO does not remain vacant at any point
of time.
requirements.object: of the IO does not remain vacant at any point of time

conditions: where both IO/s and Dy IO/s are on leave / absent
requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In a rare case where both IO/s and Dy IO/s are on leave / absent,, the bank may
designate its serving official equivalent to the General Manager rank as the IO for a period
not exceeding one month, with the approval of the Customer Service Committee of the
Board.
requirements.object: equivalent to the General Manager rank as the IO for a period not exceeding one month, with the approval of the Custome

requirements.full_sentence:
Such official shall not have any reporting relationship with the business verticals
of the bank during the period in which he/she is designated as the IO.
requirements.object: with the business verticals of the bank during the period in which he/she is designated as the IO

requirements.full_sentence:
IO in the bank shall be a fixed term of not less than three
years.
requirements.object: of not less than three years

requirements.full_sentence: IO in the bank shall not exceed five years.

(5) To fill a vacancy, the bank shall undertake the process of fresh appointment at
least three months in advance of the expiry of the tenure of the incumbent IO and ensure
that there is a reasonable overlap between the time of demitting of office of the outgoing
IO and the incoming IO.
requirements.object: fresh appointment at least three months in advance of the expiry of the tenure of the incumbent IO and ensure that there is a

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall not be removed before the completion of his/her contracted
term without the approval of the Customer Service Committee of the Board.
requirements.object: completion of his/her contracted term without the approval of the Customer Service Committee of the Board

conditions:
In case a
vacancy arises on account of reasons beyond the control of the bank (such as
resignation
requirements.timeline: within 10 working days from the date of such vacancy and shall appoint a new IO
requirements.full_sentence:
In case a
vacancy arises on account of reasons beyond the control of the bank (such as
resignation, incapacitation, illness, death, etc.), the bank shall inform Reserve Bank of
India within 10 working days from the date of such vacancy and shall appoint a new IO /
<image>
Dy.
requirements.object: India within 10 working days from the date of such vacancy and shall appoint a new IO / <image> Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The Customer Service Committee of the Board of the bank, as the case may be,
shall determine the structure of emoluments, facilities and benefits accorded to the IO /
Dy.
requirements.object: emoluments, facilities and benefits accorded to the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO, which should be appropriate keeping in view the stature and position of the IO /
Dy.
requirements.object: view the stature and position of the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO, once determined, shall not be changed
adversely during the tenure of the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: the tenure of the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
Administrative Oversight
(1) The IO shall report to the Competent Authority, as defined under clause 4(1)(b) of
the Directions, of the bank administratively, and to the Customer Service Committee of
the Board of the bank functionally.
requirements.object: Authority, as defined under clause 4(1)(b) of the Directions, of the bank administratively, and to the Customer Service Commit

requirements.full_sentence:
Secretariat of the office of Internal Ombudsman
(1) The bank shall provide such number of its officers and staff to the office of the IO
as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the office of the IO.
requirements.object: its officers and staff to the office of the IO as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the office of the IO

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) All other requisite office infrastructure, including information technology support
shall be made available to the office of the IO to enable the IO/ Dy.
requirements.object: the office of the IO to enable the IO/ Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The office of the IO may preferably be placed in the Head Office or Corporate
Office of the bank.
requirements.object: the Head Office or Corporate Office of the bank

requirements.full_sentence:
Internal Audit
(1) The Internal Audit Department of the bank shall conduct an audit of the
implementation of these Directions on an annual basis, covering, inter-alia:
requirements.object: the implementation of these Directions on an annual basis, covering, inter-alia:

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The scope of the internal audit shall exclude any assessment of the correctness
of decisions taken by the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: the correctness of decisions taken by the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
Role and Responsibilities of Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal
Ombudsman
(1) The office of the IO shall not handle complaints received directly from the
complainants or members of the public.
requirements.object: from the complainants or members of the public

requirements.full_sentence:
It shall deal with the complaints that have already
been examined by the bank but have been partially resolved or being wholly rejected by
the bank.
requirements.object: that have already been examined by the bank but have been partially resolved or being wholly rejected by the bank

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall not represent the bank in legal cases before any court or fora
or authority.
requirements.object: legal cases before any court or fora or authority

requirements.full_sentence: (3) While the IO may decide any or all complaints, the power for the Dy.
requirements.object: complaints, the power for the Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO to decide
the complaints may be defined under a policy approved by the Customer Service
Committee of the Board, as the case may be.
requirements.object: policy approved by the Customer Service Committee of the Board, as the case may be

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall recommend suitable compensation to the complainant, as
per the compensation prescribed by the Reserve Bank of India in its extant guidelines, if
any, and as per the compensation policy of the bank, if any, in case there is no
prescription from the Reserve Bank of India.
requirements.object: the complainant, as per the compensation prescribed by the Reserve Bank of India in its extant guidelines

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The IO may recommend compensation in accordance with the Reserve Bank-
Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, as amended from time to time, for any consequential
loss and the loss of time, expenses incurred and harassment / mental agony suffered by
the complainant, over and above the compensation recommended in clause 12(4).
requirements.object: with the Reserve Bank- Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, as amended from time to time, for any consequential loss and

requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The office of IO shall, on a quarterly basis, analyse the pattern of all complaints
received against the bank, such as product-wise, category-wise, consumer group-wise,
geographical location-wise, etc., and provide inputs to the bank for policy intervention, if
so warranted.
requirements.object: basis, analyse the pattern of all complaints received against the bank, such as product-wise, category-wise, consumer group-wise, geographical location-wise, etc., and provide inputs to the bank for policy intervention

requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The IO shall suggest means for taking actions to address the root cause of
complaints of similar / repeat nature and those that require policy level changes in the
bank.
requirements.object: actions to address the root cause of complaints of similar / repeat nature and those that require policy level changes in the

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall have 'read-only' access to the Reserve Bank's Complaint
Management System to enable them to keep abreast of decisions of the RBI
Ombudsman / Appellate Authority.
requirements.object: the Reserve Bank's Complaint Management System to enable them to keep abreast of decisions of the RBI Ombudsman / Appellate

requirements.full_sentence: The bank shall seek such access for the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence: IO shall functionally report to the IO.
requirements.object: IO

requirements.full_sentence:
Board Oversight
(1) The IO shall be designated as a permanent invitee to the meetings of the Customer
Service Committee of the Board.
requirements.object: permanent invitee to the meetings of the Customer Service Committee of the Board

requirements.full_sentence:
In banks having multiple IOs, a view shall be taken by
the Customer Service Committee of the Board to have representation of more than one
IO or having a system of rotation.
requirements.object: Customer Service Committee of the Board to have representation of more than one IO or having a system of rotation

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The IO shall furnish periodic reports (including the analysis of complaints) on his /
her activities to the Customer Service Committee of the Board, preferably at quarterly,
but not less than half yearly, intervals.
requirements.object: the analysis of complaints) on his / her activities to the Customer Service Committee of the Board, preferably at

requirements.full_sentence:
IO has been overruled by the
Competent Authority shall be placed before the Customer Service Committee of the
Board of the bank for review.
requirements.object: Customer Service Committee of the Board of the bank for review

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) Information on the complaints resolved by the RBI Ombudsman in favour of
complainant, either partially or fully, shall also be placed before the Customer Service
Committee of the Board, on quarterly basis.
requirements.object: the Customer Service Committee of the Board, on quarterly basis

requirements.full_sentence:
The information shall be accompanied with
an analysis of minimum top five categories of complaints along with remedial measures
so as to avoid complaints of a similar nature in future.
requirements.object: analysis of minimum top five categories of complaints along with remedial measures so as to avoid complaints of a similar natur

requirements.full_sentence:
Procedure for Complaint Redress by Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal
Ombudsman
(1) A fully automated Complaints Management System shall be put in place by the
bank and access to the System shall be provided to the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: by the bank and access to the System shall be provided to the IO / Dy
the office of the IO for review

requirements.full_sentence: (2) The bank shall provide only three categories i.e.
requirements.object: i

requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The bank shall formulate a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) for flow of
complaints and information in a time bound manner.
requirements.object: Procedure (SOP) for flow of complaints and information in a time bound manner

requirements.full_sentence:
(4) The bank shall ensure that a complaint is not closed by the same branch / unit /
other touch points, whether it has been resolved (fully or partially) or rejected.
requirements.object: is not closed by the same branch / unit / other touch points, whether it has been resolved (fully or partially) or rejected

requirements.full_sentence:
A complaint
which is being wholly rejected or partially resolved shall be reviewed at a fairly senior
level, which the bank may decide as deemed fit, before sending it to the office of IO.
requirements.object: fairly senior level, which the bank may decide as deemed fit, before sending it to the office of IO

requirements.full_sentence:
(5) The following types of complaints shall be outside the purview of these Directions
and shall not be handled by the IO/ Dy.
requirements.object: IO/ Dy

requirements.full_sentence: The bank shall forward all rejected / partially resolved complaints under the categories
requirements.object: partially resolved complaints under the categories

requirements.full_sentence:
IO, who shall look for inherent deficiency in service in
such cases and take a view whether any of these complaints can be exempted under (a)
and / or (b) above as decided by the bank.
requirements.object: in service in such cases and take a view whether any of these complaints can be exempted under (a) and / or (b) above as

requirements.full_sentence:
Complaints that are outside the purview of
these Directions shall be immediately returned back to the bank by the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: to the bank by the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall examine the complaints based on records available with the
bank, including any documents submitted by the complainant and comments/
clarifications furnished by the bank to the specific queries of the IO.
requirements.object: on records available with the bank, including any documents submitted by the complainant and comments/ clarifications fur

requirements.full_sentence:
IO may hold meetings with the concerned functionaries of the bank
and seek any additional record / document available with the bank that are necessary for
examining the complaint and reviewing the decision.
requirements.object: concerned functionaries of the bank and seek any additional record / document available with the bank that are necessary for ex

requirements.full_sentence:
(9) The bank shall ensure that the final decision is communicated to the complainant
within a period of 30 days from the date of receipt of complaint by the bank.
requirements.object: decision is communicated to the complainant within a period of 30 days from the date of receipt of complaint by the bank

requirements.full_sentence: IO shall record a "reasoned decision" in each case.
requirements.object: in each case

requirements.full_sentence:
IO upholds the decision of the bank to reject or partially resolve
the complaint, the reply to the complainant should explicitly state that the said complaint
has been reviewed by the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: said complaint has been reviewed by the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO, the bank shall advise the complainant about the option of approaching
the RBI Ombudsman for redress (excluding complaints not covered under the Reserve
<image>
Bank- Integrated Ombudsman Scheme, as amended from time to time) along with
complete details of the complaint.
requirements.object: the option of approaching the RBI Ombudsman for redress (excluding complaints not covered under the Reserve <image> Bank-

requirements.full_sentence:
The bank in its reply shall also mention the URL of
Reserve Bank's Complaint Management System portal for online filing of customer
complaints (https://cms.rbi.org.in) and the physical / email address of the Centralised
Receipt and Processing Centre1.
requirements.object: of Reserve Bank's Complaint Management System portal for online filing of customer complaints (https://cms

requirements.full_sentence:
IO shall be mandatorily included in the information to be submitted by the bank to the
RBI Ombudsman if the complaint was already reviewed by the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: the information to be submitted by the bank to the RBI Ombudsman if the complaint was already reviewed by the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO, the bank shall necessarily seek
his/ her comments and submit the same to the RBI Ombudsman.
requirements.object: comments and submit the same to the RBI Ombudsman

requirements.full_sentence: (14) The bank shall use the analysis of complaints handled by IO / Dy.
requirements.object: complaints handled by IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO may also be involved in such
trainings, where necessary.
requirements.object: such trainings

requirements.full_sentence:
IO towards developing uniformity across the
bank in the redress of complaints, the Customer Service Committee of the Board shall
also analyse the number of cases where there is substantive difference between the
decisions of the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: of cases where there is substantive difference between the decisions of the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
(16) The bank shall widely disseminate the guidelines / instructions regarding these
Directions among the staff while communicating the appointment of IO/ Dy.
requirements.object: / instructions regarding these Directions among the staff while communicating the appointment of IO/ Dy

requirements.full_sentence: (17) The bank shall not provide the contact details of the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: of the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence: IO shall not handle complaints received directly from the customers.
requirements.object: from the customers

requirements.full_sentence:
Supervisory Oversight
(1) The areas relating to customer service and customer grievance redress, as well
as the implementation of these Directions, shall be a part of the supervisory review by
the Department of Supervision of the Reserve Bank.
requirements.object: the supervisory review by the Department of Supervision of the Reserve Bank

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) Consumer Education and Protection Department of the Reserve Bank may review
the cases where the decision of the IO / Dy.
requirements.object: the decision of the IO / Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
IO has not been accepted by the bank and
the aggrieved complainant approaches the RBI Ombudsman, for assessing the
effectiveness of the internal grievance redress mechanism of the bank and initiating
corrective actions as it may deem fit.

Reporting to Reserve Bank
(1) The bank shall, within five working days of appointment of the IO or Dy.
requirements.object: days of appointment of the IO or Dy

requirements.full_sentence:
Date of intimation to the Reserve Bank
(2) The bank shall put in place a system of periodic reporting of information to the
Consumer Education and Protection Department, Central Office, Reserve Bank of India,
on a quarterly basis as per format provided in the Annexure.
requirements.object: system of periodic reporting of information to the Consumer Education and Protection Department, Central Office, Reserve Bank of India,

requirements.full_sentence:
The report shall be
submitted on or before the 15th day of the month following the quarter to which it relates
to.
requirements.object: before the 15th day of the month following the quarter to which it relates to

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) All appointments / actions under the aforesaid Master Direction, prior to the
coming into effect of these Directions, shall be deemed to have been made under these
Directions.
requirements.object: been made under these Directions
